name: Pumpernickel Bread- 1 1/2 Pound Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the ingredients into the bread pan in the order listed, or reverse the order if your machine's manual specifies dry ingredients first and liquids last.
2. Select the Basic Wheat Cycle with a Light setting (or the equivalent setting for your machine).
3. Push Start.
4. Makes 12-14 servings.
5. Nutrient Analysis per Serving: Calories: 157; Carbohydrates: 28; Protein: 5; Fat: 4; Fiber: 3.
